name: ai-code-reviewer-backend
description: Express backend for AI Code Reviewer

scripts.test: node --experimental-test-module-mocks --test ../Utils/tests/languages.test.js config/tests/env.test.js src/utils/tests/sseErrors.test.js src/validators/tests/review.schema.test.js src/prompts/tests/systemPrompt.test.js src/middlewares/tests/notFound.middleware.test.js src/middlewares/tests/rateLimit.middleware.test.js src/services/tests/review.service.test.js src/controllers/tests/review.controller.test.js src/routes/tests/review.routes.test.js src/tests/app.test.js src/tests/index.test.js
